calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: R. Boyd McSparran, Esq. for Plaintiff
Mary Nilan, Plaintiff
Ross McLauran Madden, Esq. for Defendants
Bela Kitsis, Defendant

Settlement conference held. Case settled. A written stipulation for entry of judgment was signed by all parties. The main terms of the agreement were put on the record as follows:
Restitution of the premises located at 2356 18th Street, SF, CA
Defendants will pay rent and damages for each day after 11/1/03.
Defendants will vacate the said premises by midnight, 2/1/04.
If defendant vacates by 2/1/04, Plaintiff will dismiss this action with prejudice.
If defendant does not comply with the terms of the agreement, judgment will be issued with 25 hour notice.
Plaintiff will provide letter with-in 24 hours that the defendants have never been late on their rent.
Plaintiff requested that the agreement not be filed.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Court Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Beldon Yee

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-05-2003 Advanced From Jan-08-04 To Dec-18-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
R. Boyd McSparran, Esq., Goldstein, Gellman, Melbostad, Gibson & Harris (415) 673-5600 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT YANKEL KITSIS, BORIS KITSIS, BELA KITSIS and DAN KITSIS'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED with 5 days leave to answer. Order signed. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
